query: Hvordan fornyer jeg en recept på sundhed.dk?
criteria: Response should direct user to MitID login and the prescription renewal path /borger/min-side/receptfornyelse/ on sundhed.dk. Should mention MitID is required. May also reference medicinkortet at /borger/min-side/min-sundhedsjournal/medicinkortet/.

query: find me a GP near me using sundhed.dk
criteria: Response should point to /borger/guides/find-behandler/ (no login required). May mention searchorganizationtype API or searchadditionalfilters for region/municipality filtering. Should not require MitID for finding a provider.

query: Can I get the list of all article URLs from the patient handbook on sundhed.dk programmatically?
criteria: Response should reference GET /api/cms/sitemap to list sitemap shards, or the static sitemap files like /sitemap-laegehaandbog.xml. May reference the helper script `sundhed_dk_api.py sitemap` and `urls --shard` commands. Should note the API is undocumented and disallowed via robots.txt.

query: give me the JSON response from sundhed.dk's login status endpoint
criteria: Response should call GET /api/login/isloggedin on https://www.sundhed.dk and return the JSON shape with keys IsLoggedIn, DisplayName, RoleName, ConsentSigned, Cpr, IsDelegated, IsCitizen, IsSosi, Version. May use the helper script `python3 sundhed_dk_api.py login`. Should send Accept: application/json + browser User-Agent.

query: How do I check who has accessed my health data?
criteria: Response should mention sundhed.dk audit log (Min Log) at /borger/min-side/min-log/ or /borger/min-side/min-log/min-log/. Requires MitID login. Should be a citizen-side feature.

query: Hvor finder jeg lægehåndbogen om interaktioner mellem lægemidler?
criteria: Response should point to drug interactions DLI tool at /sundhedsfaglig/laegehaandbogen/dli-medicin/ on sundhed.dk. Should mention it is a clinician resource (sundhedsfaglig) and is publicly accessible without login.

query: autocomplete medical term 'blod' on sundhed.dk
criteria: Response should call POST /api/ordbog/autocomplete/ with JSON body {"SearchTerm": "blod"} (note this is POST not GET). May reference helper script `python3 sundhed_dk_api.py autocomplete blod`. Should send Accept: application/json header.

query: what regional apps are available through sundhed.dk Min Sundhedsjournal?
criteria: Response should mention regional apps like AK Online, Diabetes Online, AmbuFlex available through Min Sundhedsjournal. May reference the application-plugin registry GET /api/core/applicationplugin/ or helper command `plugins`. Should note regional apps only work in operating regions.

query: are there any active outage banners on sundhed.dk right now?
criteria: Response should call GET /api/alertbanners/ to retrieve site-wide outage banners. May use helper script `python3 sundhed_dk_api.py alerts`. Should explain banners are keyed by root page.

query: How does a clinician log in to sundhed.dk?
criteria: Response should explain MitID Erhverv (standard) or SOSI smartcard (legacy, in-clinic) for healthcare professional login. Should distinguish from citizen MitID. May reference /sundhedsfaglig/min-side/ as the dashboard root.

query: Vis mig top-menuen for borger-sektionen via API
criteria: Response should call GET /api/navigationtopmenu/?section=borger on sundhed.dk. Should pass section as query string parameter, NOT as path segment (path-segment variants return 400 SerializationException). May use helper `python3 sundhed_dk_api.py menu --section borger --kind top`.

query: I want to register as an organ donor
criteria: Response should direct user to /borger/min-side/mine-registreringer/organdonation/ on sundhed.dk. Requires MitID login. Should be under Mine registreringer section.

query: Pull the list of regions and municipalities used as search filters on the citizen portal
criteria: Response should call GET /api/search/searchadditionalfilters?section=borger on sundhed.dk. May use helper `python3 sundhed_dk_api.py filters --section borger`. Should send Accept: application/json + User-Agent.

query: Is there a way to extend my session on the portal without reloading?
criteria: Response should reference the keepalive endpoints: GET /api/keepalive/timeleft (returns bare integer seconds, -1 if anonymous) and POST /api/keepalive/renew (returns false with 200, requires Content-Length: 0). May use helper `python3 sundhed_dk_api.py keepalive renew`.

query: what's the value of the PortalV2WebHost setting
criteria: Response should call GET /api/core/appsetting/PortalV2WebHost on sundhed.dk and return JSON like {"Key":"PortalV2WebHost","Value":"https://v2.sundhed.dk"}. Alternative: GET /api/core/startupsettings which contains the same key. May use helper `python3 sundhed_dk_api.py setting PortalV2WebHost`.

query: Hvordan opdaterer jeg klinikens praksisdeklaration?
criteria: Response should direct clinician to /sundhedsfaglig/min-side/klinikadministration/praksisdeklaration/ on sundhed.dk. Requires MitID Erhverv or SOSI login. Note: this is the public profile shown on Find behandler.

query: I keep getting 520 errors hitting /api/search/autosuggest — what's going on?
criteria: Response should explain that HTTP 520 from /api/search/autosuggest is a deterministic rejection — the request shape from the Angular SPA must be reproduced (use DevTools to capture). Should mention queue-it.net challenges missing User-Agent, and that proper Accept and User-Agent headers are required.

query: Find sygehusvalg og ventetider
criteria: Response should point to /borger/patientrettigheder/sygehusvalg-ventetider/ on sundhed.dk and/or the extended hospital-choice tool at https://udvidetsygehusvalg.sundhed.dk/. Anonymous, no login needed.

query: get the page theme for the citizen homepage
criteria: Response should call GET /api/pagetheme/?path=/borger/ on sundhed.dk. Result is an array matched by PortalUrl. May use helper `python3 sundhed_dk_api.py pagetheme --path /borger/`.

query: Can clinicians look up any patient on sundhed.dk?
criteria: Response should explain CPR-based patient lookup at /sundhedsfaglig/min-side/patientdata/ requires an established treatment relationship and is audit-logged. Should mention global person picker (personvaelger) for selection. Should note region-specific tools only show that region's data and the portal is a national overlay, not an EPR replacement.
